creator: sudakov@sibptus.tomsk.ru
text:
Poul-Henning Kamp wrote:
> s:
> >> 
> >> >>Description:
> >> >Adding NO_TOOLCHAIN=true to /etc/make.conf breaks buildworld if
> >> >/usr/src is mounted readonly.
> >> 
> >> NO_TOOLCHAIN can only be used during installworld.
> >> 
> >
> >This should be mentioned in /usr/share/examples/etc/make.conf
> >
> >What other /etc/make.conf options cannot be used during buildworld?
> 
> Don't know.

How did you know that NO_TOOLCHAIN can only be used during
installworld? The make.conf man page and the example both say 

#NO_TOOLCHAIN=  true    # do not build programs for program development

Please note the word "build", not "install".

-- 
Victor Sudakov,  VAS4-RIPE, VAS47-RIPN
sip:sudakov@sibptus.tomsk.ru
